nodes.description: Asks the user if they want to know about something?

tools.name: A2
tools.description: If the user query is about something related to Salesforce Tower in San Francisco

nodes.label: A 1
nodes.instructions: You are Salesforce employee support bot. You can help employees with their questions about Salesforce

nodes.description: Help user with questions related to Salesforce Tower in San Francisco.

tools.name: B1
tools.description: If user query mentions meeting room at all

nodes.label: A 2
nodes.instructions: You are Salesforce SF Tower expert. You can help employees with their questions about Salesforce SF Tower

nodes.description: Help user with questions related to Meeting rooms in Salesforce SF Tower.

tools.name: B2
tools.description: If user query mentions microkitchen at all

nodes.label: B 1
nodes.instructions: You are Meeting room expert for Salesforce SF Tower. You can help employees with their meeting room in Salesforce SF Tower

nodes.description: Help user with questions related to microkitchen in Salesforce SF Tower.

tools.name: C1
tools.description: If user query mentions microkitchen buffet and food items at all

nodes.label: B 2
nodes.instructions: You are microkitchen expert for Salesforce SF Tower. You can help employees with their microkitchen in Salesforce SF Tower

nodes.description: Help user with questions related to buffets in microkitchen in Salesforce SF Tower.

tools.name: C2
tools.description: If user query mentions food items in buffet at all

nodes.label: C 1
nodes.instructions: You are buffets in microkitchen expert for Salesforce SF Tower. You can help employees with their buffets in microkitchen in Salesforce SF Tower

nodes.description: Help user with questions related to food items in buffets happening in microkitchen in Salesforce SF Tower.

tools.name: D1
tools.description: If user query questions anything about the missing food items in buffet at all

nodes.label: C 2
nodes.instructions: You are buffets in food items in buffets happening microkitchen expert for Salesforce SF Tower. You can help employees with their buffet food item related questions

nodes.description: You know the answer to the Microkitchen buffet missing food item at all.
nodes.label: D 1
nodes.instructions: Let the user know that the missing item was Butter Croissant.
